basic_details.job_title: CCRS Recruitment 2026 (Short Notice) - Apply Offline for 49 Project Associate, Office Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Central Council for Research in Siddha (CCRS)
basic_details.post_name: Consultant, Research Associate, Project Scientist, Project Associate & Office Assistant

important_dates.raw: Date of Advertisement: 31-05-2026 Last Date for Submission of Application: 22-06-2026

how_to_apply: Download the detailed notification and application format.
Fill out the application form carefully.
Superscribe the envelope with the name of the post applied for.
Send the completed application to the prescribed address before the last date.
Separate applications should be submitted for each post if applying for multiple positions.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for CCRS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of applications is 22 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in CCRS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 49 vacancies are available for various Consultant, Research Associate, Project Scientist, Project Associate, and Office Assistant posts.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for CCRS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline by sending the completed form to the prescribed address.

faq.question: Q4. Where can I download the CCRS Recruitment 2026 notification?
faq.answer: Yes, but separate applications must be submitted for each post.

faq.question: Q5. What are the eligibility criteria for CCRS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Eligibility varies by post. Generally, postgraduate or relevant degree qualifications with experience as per the post requirement are needed. Refer to the official notification for specifics.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any age limit for CCRS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Age limits are specified in the official notification and vary according to the position applied for.

faq.question: Q7. What documents are required to apply?
faq.answer: Candidates must attach educational certificates, experience proofs, and other relevant documents as mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the selected candidates be posted?
faq.answer: Posts are located across CCRS HQ and research centres in Chennai, Puducherry, Thiruvananthapuram, Mettur Dam, and Palayamkottai.
